news.title:
Action Construction Equipment (ACE) forms a 50:50 JV with Japan's KATO.
The JV, ACE KATO Pvt Ltd, combines KATO's tech with ACE's manufacturing.
news.summary:
Action Construction Equipment (ACE) forms a 50:50 JV with Japan's KATO.
The JV, ACE KATO Pvt Ltd, combines KATO's tech with ACE's manufacturing.

news.title:
Redington Ltd saw a 51.4x volume surge to 30.43 lakh shares, stock gained 12% to Rs.274.
Action Construction Equipment recorded 8x volume rise to 1.02 lakh shares, stock fell 1.3% to Rs.882.
news.summary:
Redington Ltd saw a 51.4x volume surge to 30.43 lakh shares, stock gained 12% to Rs.274.
Action Construction Equipment recorded 8x volume rise to 1.02 lakh shares, stock fell 1.3% to Rs.882.

news.title:
Construction Equipment retail sales dropped 21% YoY in Jan 2026 due to monsoon, slower infra push.
All 12 manufacturers, including JCB, Escorts Kubota, and Action Construction, showed declines per FADA data.
news.summary:
Construction Equipment retail sales dropped 21% YoY in Jan 2026 due to monsoon, slower infra push.
All 12 manufacturers, including JCB, Escorts Kubota, and Action Construction, showed declines per FADA data.

news.title:
Action Construction Equipment Ltd's board approved a JV with Japan's KATO Works Co. Ltd. for manufacturing heavy cranes.
The JV will combine KATO's tech expertise with ACE's market reach, focusing on truck, crawler, and rough terrain cranes.
news.summary:
Action Construction Equipment Ltd's board approved a JV with Japan's KATO Works Co. Ltd. for manufacturing heavy cranes.
The JV will combine KATO's tech expertise with ACE's market reach, focusing on truck, crawler, and rough terrain cranes.

news.title:
Action Construction Equipment plans to expand into piling rigs, reach stackers, and aerial platforms.
The expansion may receive support from the upcoming Production Linked Incentive scheme.
news.summary:
Action Construction Equipment plans to expand into piling rigs, reach stackers, and aerial platforms.
The expansion may receive support from the upcoming Production Linked Incentive scheme.

news.title:
Action Construction Equipment expects flat revenue for the year.
The company anticipates better profit margins than last year.
news.summary:
Action Construction Equipment expects flat revenue for the year.
The company anticipates better profit margins than last year.

news.title:
Action Construction aims to raise Agri EBIT margin from 4-5% to 12-15%.
Steady-state EBITDA post BS-V norms expected at 18-19% or 15% excluding other income.
news.summary:
Action Construction aims to raise Agri EBIT margin from 4-5% to 12-15%.
Steady-state EBITDA post BS-V norms expected at 18-19% or 15% excluding other income.

news.title:
Action Construction Equipment targets Rs 6,000-7,000 crore revenue by FY29-30.
The company plans to achieve this through strategic expansion and innovation.
news.summary:
Action Construction Equipment targets Rs 6,000-7,000 crore revenue by FY29-30.
The company plans to achieve this through strategic expansion and innovation.

news.title:
Action Construction Equipment Ltd's Q3 9M FY26 earnings show growth in total income, EBITDA.
ACE holds 60% crane market share; govt policies boost infra and construction sector growth.
news.summary:
Action Construction Equipment Ltd's Q3 9M FY26 earnings show growth in total income, EBITDA.
ACE holds 60% crane market share; govt policies boost infra and construction sector growth.

news.title:
Action Construction Equipment Ltd reported unaudited standalone and consolidated financial results for Q3FY26 and nine months ended Dec 31, 2025.
Revenue from operations for nine months stood at Rs. 2,24,589 lakhs, with profit after tax at Rs. 31,658 lakhs.
news.summary:
Action Construction Equipment Ltd reported unaudited standalone and consolidated financial results for Q3FY26 and nine months ended Dec 31, 2025.
Revenue from operations for nine months stood at Rs. 2,24,589 lakhs, with profit after tax at Rs. 31,658 lakhs.

news.title: Action Construction Equipment Q3 revenue at ₹8.53B, down from ₹8.7B YoY.
news.summary: Action Construction Equipment Q3 revenue at ₹8.53B, down from ₹8.7B YoY.

news.title:
ICRA reaffirmed Action Construction Equipment's long-term rating as ICRA AA (Stable) and short-term rating as ICRA A1.
The reaffirmed ratings indicate financial stability; details are available on the company's and ICRA's websites.
news.summary:
ICRA reaffirmed Action Construction Equipment's long-term rating as ICRA AA (Stable) and short-term rating as ICRA A1.
The reaffirmed ratings indicate financial stability; details are available on the company's and ICRA's websites.

news.title:
Action Construction Equipment Ltd announced a virtual one-on-one meet with Pari Washington on Jan 15, 2026.
The meeting is pursuant to Regulation 30 of SEBI LODR Regulations, 2015.
news.summary:
Action Construction Equipment Ltd announced a virtual one-on-one meet with Pari Washington on Jan 15, 2026.
The meeting is pursuant to Regulation 30 of SEBI LODR Regulations, 2015.

news.title:
Action Construction Equipment signed an MoU with Sanghvi Movers for local heavy crane production.
The partnership supports 'Make in India' by boosting domestic manufacturing and reducing import reliance.
news.summary:
Action Construction Equipment signed an MoU with Sanghvi Movers for local heavy crane production.
The partnership supports 'Make in India' by boosting domestic manufacturing and reducing import reliance.

news.title:
Action Construction Equipment's Q2 FY26 profit declined 5% YoY to ₹90.1 crore despite revenue growth.
Stock trades at ₹988, down 34.4% YTD, amid concerns over slowing profitability and high valuation.
news.summary:
Action Construction Equipment's Q2 FY26 profit declined 5% YoY to ₹90.1 crore despite revenue growth.
Stock trades at ₹988, down 34.4% YTD, amid concerns over slowing profitability and high valuation.

news.title:
Action Construction Equipment shared Nov 2025 presentation, highlighting crane market leadership.
Presentation covers products, management, financials, and a network in 125 locations, 37 countries.
news.summary:
Action Construction Equipment shared Nov 2025 presentation, highlighting crane market leadership.
Presentation covers products, management, financials, and a network in 125 locations, 37 countries.

news.title:
Action Construction Equipment Ltd plans investor meets on Nov 19-20, 2025 in Mumbai.
Meetings include Avendus Spark INDX and Kotak Midcap Conference, subject to changes.
news.summary:
Action Construction Equipment Ltd plans investor meets on Nov 19-20, 2025 in Mumbai.
Meetings include Avendus Spark INDX and Kotak Midcap Conference, subject to changes.

news.title:
Action Construction Equipment forecasts flat to single-digit revenue growth for FY26.
The company expects margin expansion alongside the revenue projections.
news.summary:
Action Construction Equipment forecasts flat to single-digit revenue growth for FY26.
The company expects margin expansion alongside the revenue projections.
